creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 214999
New Port: homer

A dead simple static HOMepage for your servER to keep your services on hand, from a simple yaml configuration file.

This port has s github page as it's website: https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer

This port is basically a nice static website you can configure to show some links to your own (or external) websites. This is an alternative to Heimdall (http://heimdall.site/)
